label: Transparent mason bee motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Mason Bee transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete mason bee motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single mason bee, accurate orchard-pollinator anatomy, compact body with metallic blue-black iridescent abdomen and thorax, fine pollen-dusted hairs, translucent folded wings with crisp edges, delicate legs and antennae, subtle blossom-white pollen specks, no flower or branch.
Composition/framing: centered complete full-body cutout in a calm three-quarter side view with generous padding; do not crop antennae, legs, wings, or body.
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting that preserves metallic blue-black sheen, fine hair texture, translucent wing veins, and blossom-white highlights.
Transparent workflow: place the bee on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no honeybee stripes, no wasp, no bumblebee, no hive, no honeycomb, no flower, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Mason Bee light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Mason Bee, derived from the visible transparent mason bee motif cutout in this conversation.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source asset, crisp realistic UI mockup with large readable section labels.
System identity: Mason Bee, category insect, biome orchard bloom, palette mood metallic blue black blossom white, design mood craft operations system.
Reference use: Extract metallic blue-black iridescent body panels, charcoal segmented abdomen, translucent wing veins, pollen-dusted hairs, blossom-white specks, orchard bloom clarity, and compact craft-labor precision. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and textures.
Required visible sections: Morphous Mason Bee title, Mason Bee motif story, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons with icons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command palette/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, craft operations dashboard, production queue data, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing scale, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, and color token swatches.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography examples for operations labels, dashboard headings, status badges, and data tables. Use short readable labels only.
Layout and shape: premium operational product UI, precise grid, compact but readable controls, card and control radii must be 8px or less, no pill-heavy style.
Color direction: blossom-white and cool paper backgrounds, black-carbon ink, metallic mason-blue primary, slate wing neutrals, pollen cream accents, subtle orchard status green only as minor success cue.
Constraints: no honeybee yellow-and-black stripe theme, no honeycomb pattern, no generic blue-purple gradient, no unrelated saturated colors, no one-note blue UI, no rounded radii above 8px, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Morphous Mason Bee.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Mason Bee dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board for Morphous Mason Bee. It must feel like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source asset, crisp realistic UI mockup with large readable section labels.
System identity: Mason Bee, category insect, biome orchard bloom, palette mood metallic blue black blossom white, design mood craft operations system.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent mason bee motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve metallic mason-blue primary actions, blue-black carbon surfaces, blossom-white text and pollen speck accents, translucent wing-line dividers, orchard-bloom precision, compact craft operations dashboard language, and the same component coverage.
Required visible sections: Morphous Mason Bee title, Mason Bee motif story, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons with icons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command palette/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, craft operations dashboard, production queue data, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing scale, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, and color token swatches.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography examples for operations labels, dashboard headings, status badges, and data tables. Use short readable labels only.
Layout and shape: premium operational product UI, precise grid, compact but readable controls, card and control radii must be 8px or less, no pill-heavy style.
Color direction: deep carbon and blue-black background, luminous blossom-white text, metallic blue primary controls, slate wing neutral cards, pollen cream accents, restrained orchard green success indicators, subtle pollen-speck texture.
Constraints: no neon overload, no flat pure-black empty UI, no honeybee yellow-and-black stripe theme, no honeycomb pattern, no generic blue-purple gradient, no unrelated saturated colors, no rounded radii above 8px, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Morphous Mason Bee.
